revisions.*: Because "rvslots" was not specified, a legacy format has been used for the output. This format is deprecated, and in the future the new format will always be used.

'''2-4-160

Alternative term: Sun Relay, Sun Switch

A device, operated by daylight, that automatically lights and extinguishes an electric light, usually lighting it at or about sunset and extinguishing it at or about sunrise.

{{IALAFooter}}

{{languages|Daylight Control}}
